source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/91_인증 - 국내/02. G series + CYAN/1. 신청시 제출본/03 기술문서 심사에 관한 자료/03 제품의 성능 및 안전을 확인하기 위한 자료 (Rev)/04 성능에 관한 자료 (Rev)/2. [GT series] 성능시험성적서 (A-PTR-CYN).docx

document.title: 성능 시험 성적서 / Performance Test Report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Performance test report confirming the performance settings and test results for the GT series medical image acquisition device models GT1717C and GT1717CP.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Technical documentation evidence for confirming product performance and safety-related performance data for domestic regulatory submission.
keyPoints: The report states it is for performance confirmation of GT series detectors GT1717C and GT1717CP.
Revision history lists Rev. No. 0 issued on 2026.04.14 as first establishment.
Testing was performed from 2026.04.06 to 2026.04.10 at H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin, Korea.
All summarized performance test items are marked PASS.
The conclusion states that the performance setting values of models GT1717C and GT1717CP were confirmed to have no abnormality.

concepts.name: Trigger mode
concepts.evidence: Trigger mode AED(Automatic Exposure Detection) ... PASS; Line(Manual) Trigger ... PASS

evidence.claim: The report covers GT series detector models GT1717C and GT1717CP.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 시험 성적서는 의료영상획득장치 GT series 디텍터(GT1717C, GT1717CP) 성능 확인을 위한 시험성적서이다.

evidence.evidenceText: Product name 의료영상획득장치 Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector

The test location was H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin, Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: 시험장소: ㈜에이치앤아비즈 (경기도 용인시 처인구 처인성로41-16 2동 (우) 17118)

evidence.claim: GT1717C and GT1717CP passed the CsI deposition thickness test.
evidence.evidenceText: GT1717C CsI Deposition Thickness 300μm type: 340μm ± 10% ... PASS GT1717CP 500μm type: 520μm ± 10%

evidence.claim: The common sensor type criterion is a-Si TFT and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 공통 Sensor Type a-Si TFT 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: The common scintillator criterion is CsI and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 공통 Scintillator 확인 CsI 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: The common pixel pitch criterion is 140μm and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 공통 Pixel pitch 140μm 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: The common effective pixel number criterion is 3072 x 3072 pixels and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 공통 Effective Pixel Number 3072 x 3072pixels 전체영상 획득 후 유효한 영역의 픽셀 수 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: The common effective pixel area criterion is 430.08 mm x 430.08 mm and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 공통 Effective Pixel Area 430.08mm x 430.08mm ... PASS

evidence.claim: GT1717C and GT1717CP passed MTF testing under RQA5 beam condition at 70kV, 40mAs, 21mm Al filter, SID 150cm.
evidence.evidenceText: MTF ... RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: GT1717C and GT1717CP passed DQE testing under RQA5 beam condition at 70kV, 40mAs, 21mm Al filter, SID 150cm.
evidence.evidenceText: DQE ... RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: GT1717C sensitivity measured 148.0681 LSB/uGy against a center criterion of at least 110 LSB/uGy.
evidence.evidenceText: GT1717C Center 기준 110 LSB/uGy 이상 148.0681 LSB/uGy

evidence.claim: GT1717CP sensitivity measured 159.0634 LSB/uGy against a center criterion of at least 150 LSB/uGy.
evidence.evidenceText: GT1717CP Center 기준 150 LSB/uGy 이상 159.0634 LSB/uGy

evidence.claim: The limited resolution result is 3.57 lp/mm based on 140um pixel pitch.
evidence.evidenceText: 결과: 1 / 140um(Pixel pitch) * 2 = 3.57 lp/mm

evidence.claim: The device operated normally at 40kvp and 150kvp energy range checks.
evidence.evidenceText: 40kvp 조사 시 정상동작 정상 동작 확인 150kvp 조사 시 정상동작 정상 동작 확인

evidence.claim: The A/D conversion specification is 16bits and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: A/D Conversion 16bits ROIC 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Communication criterion is at least 1 Giga-bit Ethernet via PoE and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Communication 1 Giga-bit Ethernet via PoE (Power over Ethernet)이상 CPU모듈 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: AED and Line Manual trigger modes operated normally with image acquisition confirmed.
evidence.evidenceText: AED(Automatic Exposure Detection) 정상동작 영상취득 확인 Line(Manual) Trigger 정상동작 영상취득 확인

evidence.claim: The conclusion states the performance setting values of GT1717C and GT1717CP had no abnormality.
evidence.evidenceText: 해당 시험 결과를 통해 의료영상획득장치 (모델명: GT1717C, GT1717CP)의 성능 설정 값에 이상 없음을 확인하였다.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is provided by source metadata as MFDS/domestic, but the extracted source text does not explicitly name MFDS; it only references domestic certification context and KGMP attachment.
Cover model list includes additional G series models, but the document overview and test conclusions specifically identify GT1717C and GT1717CP as the tested models.
Source text contains apparent inconsistencies or typos: 'Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector', 'CsI 증착 두꼐', and CsI thickness results list G1717CP instead of GT1717C/GT1717CP.
The Energy range detailed section table repeats 'Limited resolution' as the test item, while the surrounding heading and results describe Energy range.
